_comment: Source of truth for per-page social-share images. Each entry renders assets/og/card.html to images/og/<slug>.png at 1200x630. To add a page: add an entry here, run `npm run build:og-cards`, then point that page's og:image + twitter:image at https://shevato.com/images/og/<slug>.png.
